allow: Bash(for dir in /Users/timfogarty/workspace/s3/musmem/magPdfs/*/; do echo "=== $\(basename "$dir"\) ==="; ls "$dir" | wc -l; done)

Bash(cat > /tmp/diag_words.py << 'EOF'
import pdfplumber, re

pdf_path = '/Users/timfogarty/workspace/s3/musmem/magPdfs/sh/sh6010.pdf'

with pdfplumber.open\(pdf_path\) as pdf:
    page = pdf.pages[2]
    bbox = page.bbox
    x1 = min\(page.width * 0.42, bbox[2]\)
    cropped = page.crop\(\(bbox[0], bbox[1], x1, bbox[3]\)\)
    
    words = cropped.extract_words\(x_tolerance=5, y_tolerance=3\)
    
    # Cluster words by y-position \(bucket size = 6 points\)
    buckets = {}
    for w in words:
        y = round\(w['top'] / 6\) * 6
        buckets.setdefault\(y, []\).append\(w\)
    
    print\(f"Total word objects: {len\(words\)}"\)
    print\(f"Y buckets: {len\(buckets\)}"\)
    print\(\)
    
    for y in sorted\(buckets\)[:60]:
        ws = sorted\(buckets[y], key=lambda w: w['x0']\)
        texts = [w['text'] for w in ws]
        line = ' '.join\(texts\)
        # Only show lines that seem TOC-like \(end in number or have useful content\)
        print\(f"  y={y:5.1f}: {line!r}"\)
EOF
python3 /tmp/diag_words.py)

Bash(cat > /tmp/check_continuation.py << 'EOF'
import pdfplumber, re

pdf_path = '/Users/timfogarty/workspace/s3/musmem/magPdfs/im/im1801.pdf'
CONT_RE = re.compile\(
    r'continued?\\s+on\\s+\(?:p\(?:age|\\.\)\\s*\)?\(\\d+\)'
    r'|cont\\.\\s+on\\s+p\\.?\\s*\(\\d+\)',
    re.IGNORECASE
\)

with pdfplumber.open\(pdf_path\) as pdf:
    print\(f"Total pages: {len\(pdf.pages\)}"\)
    for pnum in range\(1, min\(40, len\(pdf.pages\)+1\)\):
        page = pdf.pages[pnum - 1]
        text = page.extract_text\(\) or ''
        m = CONT_RE.search\(text\)
        if m:
            # Show context around match
            start = max\(0, m.start\(\) - 40\)
            print\(f"  PDF p.{pnum}: {text[start:m.end\(\)+20]!r}"\)
        # Also show last 100 chars of each page to spot continuation patterns
        tail = text.strip\(\)[-120:] if text.strip\(\) else ''
        if tail and any\(word in tail.lower\(\) for word in ['continu', 'page', 'turn to']\):
            print\(f"  PDF p.{pnum} tail: {tail!r}"\)
EOF
python3 /tmp/check_continuation.py)
